Symptoms: Brown lesions on young shoots, yellowing leaves, wilting
Cure: Prune affected leaves, apply copper fungicide

Symptoms: Exudation of brown fluid from stem, reduced leaf size
Precautions: Remove infected tissues, improve soil aeration
Cure: Scrape infected stem and apply Bordeaux paste

Symptoms: Small, circular brown spots on leaves
Yellowing of leaves, decaying roots, tree collapse
Cure: Apply nematicides around roots, use systemic fungicides
